name: Refactor Duplicated Logic into Functions
description: The file `report_generator.py` has duplicated formatting logic across three functions. Refactor by extracting a shared helper function `format_section(title, items, bullet='- ')` that the three report functions should use. Ensure all existing tests still pass after refactoring. Do NOT modify the test file.

setup_files.report_generator.py:
"""Report generator with duplicated formatting logic."""


def generate_summary_report(title: str, findings: list[str]) -> str:
    """Generate a summary report."""
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"=== {title.upper()} ===")
    lines.append("")
    for item in findings:
        lines.append(f"- {item}")
    lines.append("")
    lines.append(f"Total: {len(findings)} findings")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def generate_action_items(title: str, actions: list[str]) -> str:
    """Generate an action items report."""
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"=== {title.upper()} ===")
    lines.append("")
    for item in actions:
        lines.append(f"- {item}")
    lines.append("")
    lines.append(f"Total: {len(actions)} actions")
    return "\n".join(lines)


def generate_risk_report(title: str, risks: list[str]) -> str:
    """Generate a risk report."""
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"=== {title.upper()} ===")
    lines.append("")
    for item in risks:
        lines.append(f"- {item}")
    lines.append("")
    lines.append(f"Total: {len(risks)} risks")
    return "\n".join(lines)
setup_files.test_report_generator.py:
"""Tests for report generator."""
from report_generator import (
    generate_summary_report,
    generate_action_items,
    generate_risk_report,
)


def test_summary_report():
    result = generate_summary_report("Audit", ["item1", "item2"])
    assert "=== AUDIT ===" in result
    assert "- item1" in result
    assert "- item2" in result
    assert "Total: 2 findings" in result


def test_action_items():
    result = generate_action_items("Sprint", ["fix bug", "add test", "deploy"])
    assert "=== SPRINT ===" in result
    assert "- fix bug" in result
    assert "Total: 3 actions" in result


def test_risk_report():
    result = generate_risk_report("Security", ["sql injection"])
    assert "=== SECURITY ===" in result
    assert "- sql injection" in result
    assert "Total: 1 risks" in result


def test_empty_findings():
    result = generate_summary_report("Empty", [])
    assert "Total: 0 findings" in result


def test_empty_actions():
    result = generate_action_items("Nothing", [])
    assert "Total: 0 actions" in result


def test_empty_risks():
    result = generate_risk_report("Clean", [])
    assert "Total: 0 risks" in result

expected_outcomes: A format_section helper function is extracted
All three report functions use the shared helper
